name: Source Review

title: "[Source Review] "

---

## Source under review

- Title:
- URL:
- Source tier:
- Source type:

## Why review it

- New source to add
- Redirect or URL change
- Publication date update
- Better official source available
- Source quality concern

## Verification steps

- Confirm the source is official, institutional, or secondary
- Check whether it is the best source for this job
- Record publication date and access notes
- Check where it is used in the canonical graph

## Recommendation

- Keep as-is
- Replace
- Downgrade
- Archive

## Notes

- Any constraints, caveats, or follow-up work
